name: fastapi-iot-core
description: Core FastAPI setup for IoT: Dependency Injection, Pydantic Telemetry models, Event-driven async patterns, and CORS.

name: fastapi-iot-security
description: Implements JWT Authentication for Web Users and Device Authentication for IoT Edge nodes.

name: fastapi-route-generator
description: Generates boilerplate and logic for FastAPI endpoints.

name: iot-database-manager
description: Dual-database management for IoT: PostgreSQL for Relational Metadata and InfluxDB for Time-Series Telemetry.

name: iot-testing-deployment
description: Testing strategies and Dockerization for FastAPI IoT backend.

name: esp-idf-build-manager
description: Handles ESP-IDF project compilation, flashing, and monitoring. Use this to build firmware, flash to ESP32 devices, and check logs.

name: esp-idf-sensor-driver
description: Develops I2C/SPI drivers and data acquisition logic for ESP-IDF.

name: lte-mqtt-client-manager
description: Manages the A7680C 4G LTE module and MQTT persistence.

name: tinyml-wrapper
description: Wraps TinyML models (Edge Impulse/TF Lite) for on-device inference.

name: mqtt-hook-generator
description: Generates React hooks for managing MQTT connections and telemetry data.

name: realtime-chart-config
description: Configures Recharts for visualizing high-frequency IMU and telemetry data.

name: shadcn-component-builder
description: Builds accessible and stylish UI components using Shadcn UI and Tailwind CSS.

name: git-ops-manager
description: Quản lý các thao tác Git (Push, Pull, Branch, Commit) theo chuẩn dự án, hỗ trợ đa workspace và tự động hóa thông điệp commit kèm ngày tháng.

name: iot-system-architect-brainstormer
description: Hỗ trợ phân tích, thiết kế kiến trúc và brainstorm cho các dự án IoT toàn diện, bao gồm vi điều khiển/Firmware, hạ tầng Backend, và Web/Mobile Frontend. Sử dụng skill này khi cần lên ý tưởng, lựa chọn công nghệ và giải quyết các bài toán về luồng dữ liệu IoT.

name: requirement-validator
description: Ensures that all proposed changes and existing code align with the Strict Scope and Mandatory Tech Stack.

name: sprint-review-gen
description: Generates a high-level status report of the project's progress.

name: task-breakdown
description: Decomposes major project screens into granular sub-tasks for frontend and backend.

name: influxdb-query-manager
description: Handles complex time-series queries for device activity history.

name: mqtt-to-db-bridge
description: Bridges MQTT messages to persistent storage (Postgres/InfluxDB).
